consumables.name: Roman Bread
consumables.desc: Coarse panis. The staple of legions and Christians alike.

consumables.name: Roman Wine
consumables.desc: Watered wine. Restores body and spirit.

consumables.name: Lamp Oil
consumables.desc: Light in the catacombs. Helps you see traps.

consumables.name: Vinegar Sponge
consumables.desc: Sharp enough to wake the dead.

sacramentals.name: Catacomb Holy Water
sacramentals.desc: Blessed in the tunnels beneath Rome.

sacramentals.name: Apostolic Oil
sacramentals.desc: Oil blessed by Peter himself. Extraordinarily rare.

sacramentals.name: Martyr's Sand
sacramentals.desc: Sand from the arena floor, stained with the blood of witnesses.

weapons.name: Roman Gladius
weapons.desc: The short sword of Rome. Efficient, deadly, practical.

weapons.name: Catacomb Torch
weapons.desc: A burning brand. Lights the way and wards off beasts.

weapons.name: Fisherman's Spear
weapons.desc: Peter was a fisherman. This is his kind of weapon.

garments.name: Roman Tunic
garments.desc: Common wool tunic. Blends in with the populace.

garments.name: Catacomb Robe
garments.desc: Worn by the faithful during underground Mass.

garments.name: Praetorian Cloak
garments.desc: Taken from a guard. Heavy but protective.

headgear.name: Catacomb Veil
headgear.desc: Used during the sacred mysteries below ground.

accessories.name: Ichthys Pendant
accessories.desc: The secret sign of Christians. ΙΧΘΥΣ.

relics.name: Peter's Key Fragment
relics.desc: A fragment of iron blessed by Peter. Grows warm near the faithful.

relics.name: Eternal Lamp
relics.desc: An oil lamp that never quite goes out.

materials.name: Roman Denarius
materials.desc: Silver coin of the Empire. Render unto Caesar...

key_items.name: Priscilla's Letter
key_items.desc: A coded message warning the outer communities.

key_items.name: Arena Pass
key_items.desc: Forged document granting access to the Colosseum undercroft.

key_items.name: Nero's Decree
key_items.desc: The imperial order condemning all Christians in Rome.
